components.name: button
components.description: A versatile button with size and variant support

components.name: badge
components.description: Compact status or metadata label. Soft tint by default; solid for high emphasis.

components.name: spinner
components.description: Indeterminate circular loading indicator. Inherits text color unless tone is set.

components.name: divider
components.description: A thin rule separating content. Horizontal, vertical, or with a centered label.

components.name: skeleton
components.description: Loading placeholder with a soft shimmer. Text (multi-line), circle, or rect.

components.name: kbd
components.description: A keyboard key cap for shortcut hints. Single key or a combination.

components.name: avatar
components.description: User image with auto initials fallback and optional status dot. AvatarGroup stacks them.

components.name: input
components.description: Single-line text field with optional leading icon, trailing node, and invalid state.

components.name: textarea
components.description: Multi-line text field. Vertically resizable, with an invalid state.

components.name: icon-button
components.description: A square, label-less button for toolbar/inline icon actions. Always provide aria-label.

components.name: tag
components.description: Removable / selectable pill for filters, tokens, and multi-select chips.

components.name: checkbox
components.description: Boolean checkbox with optional label, description, and indeterminate state.

components.name: switch
components.description: Instant on/off toggle for settings that apply immediately (no separate save).

components.name: radio-group
components.description: Single-choice radio group rendered from an options array.

components.name: select
components.description: Styled native dropdown. Pass options or your own option children.

components.name: progress
components.description: Linear progress bar — determinate (value/max) or indeterminate (animated).

components.name: slider
components.description: Drag/keyboard numeric slider. Single value, or a two-thumb min-max band with range.

components.name: stat
components.description: A metric / KPI tile: label, large value, and an optional trend delta. StatGroup lays out a row.

components.name: alert
components.description: Inline callout for status messaging. Four tones with a default icon and optional dismiss.

components.name: banner
components.description: A full-width page/section announcement bar. Subtle or solid, with optional action and dismiss.

components.name: field
components.description: Labelled wrapper for a form control, with hint and error slots.

components.name: card
components.description: Primary surface container with flat/raised/floating elevation. Compose with header, body, footer.

components.name: snippet
components.description: Copyable code — inline command or a multi-line block with title, language, and line numbers.

components.name: breadcrumb
components.description: Hierarchical location trail. Data-driven items with chevron/slash separators and optional collapse.

components.name: pagination
components.description: Page navigation for tables and lists. Controlled, with sibling collapse and an optional summary.

components.name: segmented-control
components.description: Compact single-select toggle for 2-5 mutually exclusive options, with a sliding thumb.

components.name: tabs
components.description: Horizontal section switcher. Underline or pill style; controlled, render your own panels.

components.name: number-input
components.description: Numeric field with -/+ steppers, min/max clamping, step increments, and arrow-key control.

components.name: toggle
components.description: A single pressable on/off button (text and/or icon). ToggleGroup adds single/multiple select.

components.name: empty-state
components.description: Placeholder for a zero / blank view, with optional icon, copy, and actions.

components.name: stepper
components.description: Progress through an ordered sequence of steps. Horizontal or vertical; done / current / upcoming.
